title: Add forbidden pattern regression tests
objective: Add tests that scan all pilot five-layer pools and reject non-object forbidden patterns.
requirements: Test all five pool keys for every pilot bundle.
Use precise forbidden terms based on user feedback and removed bad entries.
acceptance_criteria: A new test fails if any pool entry contains forbidden non-object patterns.
The test covers core_items, support_items, visible_small_items, conditional_items, and blocked_or_risky.
The full unittest discovery command passes.

result.summary: Added all-pool forbidden non-object pattern regression coverage; unittest discovery ran 24 tests OK.
